## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `a2g ...`
2. Provide input `...`
3. Observe error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Rust version: [output of `rustc --version`]
- A2G CLI version: [output of `a2g --version`]

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (config files, screenshots, etc.).
